rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks using assume/guarantee for component type scope, and assign for implementation scope bindings only.
Use visible feature names from the model; avoid subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when expressing input-output relationships.
Use assignments in implementation annexes to bind outputs to subcomponent signals, not in type scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Use `guarantee` to express output dependencies on visible inputs, not internal subcomponents.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as variables in AGREE expressions.
Avoid placing guarantee clauses in implementation scope; use assign for bindings instead.
